message:
perf(MetaballsCanvasAdapter): add row-level spatial culling (bd-3e1t.5.3.1)

Add zero-cost row-skip check before processing each row in fill().
Exploits the bound sum(r²_i/dist²_i) ≤ sum(r²_i)/min(dy²_i): if the
nearest ball is vertically farther than sum_r2/glow, no pixel in the row
can exceed the glow threshold.

Cost: one min-reduction (comparisons only, zero divisions) per row.
Benefit: skips entire rows provably outside all balls' influence radius,
saving W × balls_len divisions per culled row.  Zero-cost when all rows
contain visible field (benchmark's dense default configuration).

Benchmarks (vs baseline, 3-run median):
  80x24  Full:  53µs  (budget <500µs,  9.4× headroom)
  120x40 Full: 132µs  (budget <1ms,    7.6× headroom)
  240x80 Full: 524µs  (budget <4ms,    7.6× headroom)

All 30 canvas_adapter tests pass.  Determinism preserved — skipped rows
produce zero pixels by construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
